overall_project_analysis.verdict: Full orchestrator team initialized to decompose the request.

task_pipeline.description: Design a microservices, event-driven, real-time, concurrent, distributed architecture
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Act as a Principal Systems Architect and provide a high-level design for the architecture, including component interactions and data flow.

task_pipeline.description: Implement Kubernetes deployment with Docker orchestration
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Write robust, modular code for deploying the application on Kubernetes using Docker, including configuration files and deployment scripts.

task_pipeline.description: Develop REST and GraphQL APIs with ORM and migrations
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Act as a Solid Mid-Level/Senior Developer and provide API implementations, including database schema design, migration scripts, and API endpoint definitions.

task_pipeline.description: Implement caching, middleware, state management, and routing
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Write modular code for caching, middleware, state management, and routing, including integration with the API and database layers.

task_pipeline.description: Integrate third-party services, background jobs, task queues, and cron jobs
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Act as a Solid Mid-Level/Senior Developer and provide implementations for integrating third-party services, including configuration files and integration code.

task_pipeline.description: Develop search, pagination, file uploads, notification, and email services
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Write robust, modular code for search, pagination, file uploads, notification, and email services, including integration with the API and database layers.

task_pipeline.description: Implement WebSocket communications, rate limiting, and comprehensive security
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Act as a Principal Systems Architect and provide implementations for WebSocket communications, rate limiting, and comprehensive security, including authentication, password hashing, and payment processing.

task_pipeline.description: Configure CI/CD pipelines, service mesh, and disaster recovery
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Act as a Principal Systems Architect and provide configurations for CI/CD pipelines, service mesh, and disaster recovery, including scripts and configuration files.
